name: Summer of Hengyang in 1944
short_description: The game is set in the summer of 1944 during the defense of Hengyang, China. General Fang leads the Tenth Army with 17000 soldiers to resist 110000 Japanese soldiers for 47 days.
detailed_description: The game is set in the summer of 1944 during the defense of Hengyang, China. General Fang leads the Tenth Army with 17000 soldiers to resist 110000 Japanese soldiers for 47 days.This is a tower defense RTS game, where players can use the WASD keyboard and mouse to control the map and quickly select soldiers to find the right time to attack the enemy command center.
about_the_game: The game is set in the summer of 1944 during the defense of Hengyang, China. General Fang leads the Tenth Army with 17000 soldiers to resist 110000 Japanese soldiers for 47 days.This is a tower defense RTS game, where players can use the WASD keyboard and mouse to control the map and quickly select soldiers to find the right time to attack the enemy command center.
supported_languages: English, French, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
